_comment: Optional. Copy to ia-settings.json (or point CC_IA_SETTINGS at it) to spread the Ollama work across several hosts. A bare string is a backend URL; an object may pin specific models to a backend. Each model is always routed to the SAME backend (a pinned backend wins, else a backend that actually has the model, chosen by a stable hash of the name) so the model stays warm there and a panel runs across machines in parallel. Delete/omit this file to use only the local backend.
